Package com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl

Class AbstractMockProvider

java.lang.Object
com.rhlowery.acs.service.impl.AbstractMockProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
CatalogProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
AtlanNodeProvider, DatabricksNodeProvider, DataHubNodeProvider, GlueNodeProvider, GravitinoNodeProvider, HiveMetastoreNodeProvider, IcebergNodeProvider, PolarisNodeProvider, UnityCatalogNodeProvider
public abstract class AbstractMockProvider extends Object implements CatalogProvider
Base class for mock CatalogProvider implementations. Provides default logic for H2-backed policy storage and static metadata discovery for various simulated catalog types (Polaris, Atlan, etc.). [PlantUML: Inheritance hierarchy for mock providers showing policy storage and discovery]

      public void applyPolicy(String path, String action, String principal)
      Description copied from interface: CatalogProvider
      Applies an access policy to a resource.
      Specified by:
      applyPolicy in interface CatalogProvider
      Parameters:
      path - The target resource path
      action - The privilege to grant (e.g., SELECT, OWNERSHIP)
      principal - The user or group to grant it to
